title: _vl_insert_WI writes are unsafe (clobbers other state if '+:' index extends beyond range)

features.name: bit_select_assignment_to_small_vector
features.description: Code should include a bit select assignment (e.g., [3:0] = ...) on a signal with width 4 bits or less

features.name: unpacked_array_queue_assignment_8bit_threshold
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array or queue assigned from a signal where the signal width is 8 bits or less, causing Verilator to use CData (8-bit) instead of SData (16-bit) representation

features.name: register_feeding_bit_select_with_wide_index
features.description: Code should include a register variable that feeds a bit select assignment where the select index is derived from another signal of the same or larger width

features.name: non_blocking_assignment_small_width_state
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment to a state variable where the variable width is 4 bits or less and is used in always_ff with a reset condition
